items.title_en: European markets open higher as oil prices hold below $100
items.title_zh: 油价维持在 100 美元以下，欧洲股市开盘走高
items.desc_en: European stocks opened in positive territory on Wednesday as regional investors assess the latest military operations against Iran.
items.desc_zh: 由于地区投资者评估针对伊朗的最新军事行动，欧洲股市周三开盘上涨。

items.title_en: CNBC Daily Open: The $1 trillion club just got bigger
items.title_zh: CNBC 每日公开赛：万亿美元俱乐部变得更大
items.desc_en: South Korea's SK Hynix and U.S. chip firm Micron become the latest companies to top $1 trillion in market capitalization as the AI rally resumes.
items.desc_zh: 随着人工智能反弹的恢复，韩国 SK 海力士和美国芯片公司美光成为市值突破 1 万亿美元的最新公司。

items.title_en: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
items.title_zh: 第一批加纳人因反移民抗议将被从南非遣返
items.desc_en: It follows recent protests against illegal immigration that have led to fears there could be a resurgence in xenophobic violence.
items.desc_zh: 此前，最近针对非法移民的抗议活动引发了人们对仇外暴力可能死灰复燃的担忧。

items.title_en: SK Hynix has surged 250% this year. Analysts say the AI-fueled rally may be only halfway done
items.title_zh: SK海力士今年股价飙升250%。分析师表示，人工智能推动的反弹可能只完成了一半
items.desc_en: Analysts say the AI memory cycle still has years to run, with limited new capacity and surging cloud investment supporting further upside for SK Hynix.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，人工智能内存周期仍有数年时间，新增产能有限，云投资激增，支撑 SK 海力士进一步上涨。

items.title_en: Why the UAE walked away from OPEC
items.title_zh: 阿联酋为何退出欧佩克
items.desc_en: The United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC after nearly 60 years marks a major shift in the global oil order. Officially framed as an economic decision, the move reflects Abu Dhabi’s frustration
items.desc_zh: 阿联酋在近 60 年后决定退出 OPEC，标志着全球石油秩序​​的重大转变。此举被官方视为一项经济决定，反映了阿布扎比的挫败感

items.title_en: Attorney General Ken Paxton routs  veteran incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate primary
items.title_zh: 总检察长肯·帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州参议院初选中击败现任老将科宁
items.desc_en: The race will help determine whether Democrats can win back control of the US Senate for the last half of the Trump presidency.
items.desc_zh: 这场竞选将有助于决定民主党能否在特朗普总统任期的后半段重新夺回美国参议院的控制权。

items.title_en: One killed and others missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
items.title_zh: 美国造纸厂发生化学爆炸，造成一人死亡、多人失踪
items.desc_en: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.
items.desc_zh: 华盛顿州朗维尤一家造纸厂的储罐破裂，造成九人受伤，另有九人失踪。

items.title_en: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅

items.title_en: Hundreds of children die within months as measles cases soar in Bangladesh
items.title_zh: 孟加拉国麻疹病例激增，数月内数百名儿童死亡
items.desc_en: The country has recorded more than 60,000 suspected cases of measles in just over two months.
items.desc_zh: 在短短两个多月内，该国已记录了超过 6 万例麻疹疑似病例。

items.title_en: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
items.title_zh: 尽管欧盟推动降低风险，欧洲企业仍加倍投资中国制造业
items.desc_en: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.
items.desc_zh: 尽管欧盟面临减少海外依赖的压力，但中国较低的制造成本使许多欧洲企业的供应链留在了中国。

items.title_en: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
items.title_zh: AI热潮提振韩国芯片股 SK海力士估值达1万亿美元
items.desc_en: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.
items.desc_zh: 周三，SK 海力士股价飙升超过 11%，推动这家韩国存储芯片制造商的市值突破 1 万亿美元大关。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: White House erects UFC cage ahead of US 250th anniversary celebrations
items.title_zh: 白宫在美国成立 250 周年庆典前搭建 UFC 笼
items.desc_en: Workers were seen assembling domed arches and a staging area on the South Lawn in preparation for next month's event.
items.desc_zh: 人们看到工人们正在南草坪组装圆顶拱门和一个集结区，为下个月的活动做准备。

items.title_en: Russia 'relentlessly targeting' critical infrastructure and democracy, GCHQ says
items.title_zh: 英国政府通讯总部称，俄罗斯“无情地瞄准”关键基础设施和民主
items.desc_en: The spy agency's head will set out threats facing the UK and the measures she believes need to be taken to confront them on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 该间谍机构负责人将于周三阐述英国面临的威胁以及她认为需要采取的应对措施。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Can EU find a Russia whisperer to mediate an end to war in Ukraine?
items.title_zh: 欧盟能否找到一位俄罗斯耳语者来调解结束乌克兰战争？
items.desc_en: With the US pulling out of trilateral talks with Russia and Ukraine, the EU is looking for potential candidates to step in.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国退出与俄罗斯和乌克兰的三边谈判，欧盟正在寻找潜在的候选人介入。

items.title_en: Federal judge had sex in chambers with high-ranking police officer, panel says
items.title_zh: 专家小组称，联邦法官在室内与高级警官发生性关系
items.desc_en: The judge sits in a district court in either Alabama, Georgia or Florida, but their name is being kept secret by a disciplinary panel.
items.desc_zh: 该法官在阿拉巴马州、佐治亚州或佛罗里达州的地区法院任职，但纪律小组对他们的名字保密。

items.title_en: Three killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on Gaza City, medics and witnesses say
items.title_zh: 医务人员和目击者称，以色列对加沙城的袭击造成三人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Israel says it was targeting a Hamas commander whose predecessor was killed in a similar strike earlier in May.
items.desc_zh: 以色列表示，其目标是一名哈马斯指挥官，该指挥官的前任在五月初的一次类似袭击中被杀。

items.title_en: Stock futures are little changed after the S&P 500 closes at another record: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数收盘再创新高后，股票期货几乎没有变化：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh intraday and closing records on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数周二创下盘中和收盘新纪录。

items.title_en: SpaceX-Tesla merger chatter reignites as Musk pushes rocket company towards Nasdaq
items.title_zh: 随着马斯克将火箭公司推向纳斯达克，SpaceX 与特斯拉合并的讨论重新燃起
items.desc_en: With SpaceX headed for the public markets next month, industry experts and people close to Elon Musk are speculating about a potential tie-up with Tesla.
items.desc_zh: 随着 SpaceX 下个月上市，行业专家和接近埃隆·马斯克的人士正在猜测与特斯拉的潜在合作。

items.title_en: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局公布了建造永久月球基地的下一步措施
items.desc_en: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局计划将跳跃无人机和漫游车发送到月球，作为永久月球基地计划的一部分。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: What is the role of a teacher once AI arrives in the school classroom?
items.desc_zh: 当人工智能走进学校课堂后，老师的角色是什么？

items.title_en: Markets suggest stocks are on solid ground and crude oil could be in for a decline, Todd Gordon says
items.title_zh: 托德·戈登表示，市场表明股市基础稳固，原油可能会下跌
items.desc_en: The VIX is saying that equities are in good shape and, if a resolution of the war is near, crude oil may plummet into the $80s, and maybe $70s, per barrel.
items.desc_zh: VIX 表示，股市状况良好，如果战争即将解决，原油价格可能会暴跌至每桶 80 美元，甚至 70 美元。

items.title_en: Osaka sparkles in golden French Open outfit
items.title_zh: 大阪身穿金色法网球衣闪耀
items.desc_en: Naomi Osaka continues her tradition of serving jaw-dropping looks at Grand Slams with an outfit that reminds her of "the Eiffel tower at night".
items.desc_zh: 大坂直美延续了她在大满贯赛事中展现令人瞠目结舌的传统，她的着装让人想起“夜晚的埃菲尔铁塔”。

items.title_en: Cornyn and Paxton go head-to-head in Texas Republican Senate primary after Trump endorsement
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，科宁和帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州共和党参议院初选中正面交锋
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump last week endorsed Texas Attorney General over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统上周支持德克萨斯州总检察长取代现任参议员约翰·科宁。

items.title_en: CircadiaOS
items.title_zh: CircadiaOS
items.desc_en: Sleep optimization, minus the $3,000 mattress pod
items.desc_zh: 睡眠优化，减去 3,000 美元的床垫舱

items.title_en: GenGo
items.title_zh: GenGo
items.desc_en: Transform selected text anywhere on macOS
items.desc_zh: 在 macOS 上的任意位置转换选定的文本

items.title_en: ECB 'will do what is necessary' to tame inflation, Bank of France governor tells CNBC
items.title_zh: 法国央行行长告诉 CNBC，欧洲央行“将采取必要措施”抑制通胀
items.desc_en: Markets are overwhelmingly pricing in a rate hike from the central bank at its next meeting.
items.desc_zh: 市场绝大多数都预计央行将在下次会议上加息。

items.title_en: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
items.title_zh: 伊朗谴责美国空袭“严重违反”停火协议
items.desc_en: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.
items.desc_zh: 袭击发生时，伊朗和卡塔尔谈判代表正在多哈进行和平谈判。

items.title_en: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
items.title_zh: 以色列加强打击，黎巴嫩村庄11人死亡
items.desc_en: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.
items.desc_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡发誓要“镇压”真主党后，以色列表示袭击了黎巴嫩境内的 100 个真主党基础设施​​和武装分子。

items.title_en: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
items.title_zh: 比利时学校小巴与火车相撞 造成四人死亡
items.desc_en: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.
items.desc_zh: 比利时一位部长表示，两名小学生、他们的监护人和小巴司机在事故中丧生。

items.title_en: Delhi's most exclusive club is under threat of shutdown - can it survive?
items.title_zh: 德里最高档的俱乐部面临关闭的威胁 - 它能生存吗？
items.desc_en: The British-era Gymkhana Club is facing eviction, triggering a legal battle and a wave of nostalgia.
items.desc_zh: 英国时代的体育俱乐部面临被驱逐，引发了一场法律诉讼和一波怀旧浪潮。

items.title_en: Harbor
items.title_zh: Harbor
items.desc_en: CLI + companion to spin up complete local LLM stacks
items.desc_zh: CLI + 配套工具可启动完整的本地 LLM 堆栈

items.title_zh: Extend
items.desc_en: Parse any PDF layout with SOTA accuracy for AI pipelines
items.desc_zh: 以 SOTA 精度解析任何 PDF 布局，以实现 AI 管道

items.desc_zh: 通过您的编码代理添加语音和视频通话

items.desc_zh: 同时运行 100 多个工作流程而不会丢失上下文

items.title_en: Octolane
items.title_zh: Octolane
items.desc_en: Self-driving AI CRM that you can talk to
items.desc_zh: 可以对话的自动驾驶 AI CRM

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.title_en: Wave of child abuse cases shakes schools in Paris
items.title_zh: 虐待儿童案件浪潮震动巴黎学校
items.desc_en: A school assistant goes on trial accused of sexual mistreatment of children in his care, in the latest case to rock the Paris school system.
items.desc_zh: 一名学校助理因被控性虐待他照顾的儿童而接受审判，这是震动巴黎学校系统的最新一起案件。

items.title_en: Mojito
items.title_zh: Mojito
items.desc_en: Type to search for any emoji or symbol in seconds
items.desc_zh: 键入即可在几秒钟内搜索任何表情符号或符号

items.title_en: Aviquill
items.title_zh: Aviquill
items.desc_en: A calm canvas for visual thinkers with messy minds
items.desc_zh: 为思维混乱的视觉思考者提供的平静画布

items.title_en: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
items.title_zh: 在债务和价格压力下，美国人陷入“根深蒂固”的财务压力
items.desc_en: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
items.desc_zh: 通货膨胀和高债务水平继续引起许多美国人的财务焦虑。非营利组织可以帮助进行债务管理。

items.title_en: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
items.title_zh: 国际学生寻求美国工作的障碍越来越大：“美国梦......正在崩溃”
items.desc_en: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 国际毕业生表示，疲软的招聘市场和不断变化的移民规则使他们更难实现在美国工作的美国梦。

items.title_en: Bluedot 2.1
items.title_zh: Bluedot 2.1
items.desc_en: Record on Apple Watch. Sync with Claude
items.desc_zh: 在 Apple Watch 上录制。与克劳德同步

items.title_en: QuickSheet v1.2
items.title_zh: QuickSheet v1.2
items.desc_en: Instantly create and edit spreadsheets from your menu bar
items.desc_zh: 从菜单栏即时创建和编辑电子表格

items.title_en: Layers
items.title_zh: Layers
items.desc_en: Create beautiful animated code snippet videos for free
items.desc_zh: 免费创建精美的动画代码片段视频

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: baz.studio
items.title_zh: baz.studio
items.desc_en: Skills library & video editor for AI Agents
items.desc_zh: AI 代理的技能库和视频编辑器

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 推迟了星际飞船的发射
items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_en: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案
items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请股票上市，这可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。
